question: What is the design configuration of NuScale's steam generator?

nuscale_ch05_0025.title: References
nuscale_ch05_0025.summary: This section details the materials used in the construction of the NuScale pressurizer and its components, specifying alloys and standards for each part to ensure corrosion resistance and compatibility with operating environments. It references relevant sections of the BPVC (Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code) and lists the applicable material specifications for components such as the baffle plate, heater bundles, cover plate, and bolting.

nuscale_ch05_0019.title: Reactor Coolant System Component and Subsystem Design
nuscale_ch05_0019.summary: This section describes the design of the NuScale Power Module’s Reactor Coolant System (RCS) components and subsystems, detailing the integration of the reactor, steam generators, pressurizer, safety and ECCS valves, and associated piping within the reactor pressure vessel (RPV). It also outlines the configuration and boundaries of the steam generator system, emphasizing the integral design of the steam generators within the RPV and their role in forming the reactor coolant pressure boundary.

nuscale_ch05_0020.title: Steam Generators
nuscale_ch05_0020.summary: The steam generators (SGs) in the NuScale Power Module are integrated within the reactor pressure vessel (RPV), which also houses other key components such as the pressurizer and safety valves. The SG system includes feedwater and main steam piping, plenum access ports, and thermal relief valves, with the RPV forming the outer pressure boundary and the SG tubes and welds contributing to the reactor coolant pressure boundary.

edges.description: Section A provides detailed material and component information about the pressurizer, which is one of the components listed in Section B's general description of the reactor coolant system design that also includes the steam generators.

Section A describes the pressurizer components and materials within the reactor pressure vessel, while Section B provides an overview of all major components inside the NuScale reactor pressure vessel, including the steam generators, thus connecting the pressurizer (A) and steam generator (B) as co-located subsystems within the same vessel.

Section A provides a general overview of the reactor coolant system components, including the steam generators, while Section B focuses specifically on the steam generators as part of that system, thus Section A gives context for the more detailed information in Section B.
